Opposite her, a bald, pale-skinned figure in dark armor extends a hand emitting blue force lightning while holding a red lightsaber. In the misty forest background, numerous soldiers engage in combat with blaster fire and additional lightsabers visible amidst the trees.

The female warrior sustains her forward lunge wielding the blue double-bladed lightsaber. Opposite her, the pale figure continues projecting blue force lightning while gripping a red blade. Background soldiers remain locked in combat within the misty forest, with blaster fire and distant lightsabers visible but showing no major positional changes.

The female combatant holds her lunging stance with the dual-ended blue lightsaber. The pale antagonist maintains the projection of blue electricity from his hand while gripping the red blade. Distant soldiers continue fighting in the foggy woods, with laser fire and other glowing weapons visible but static in position.

The forest battle cross-fades into a dark, fiery interior. A central figure wearing a black hood and a metallic mask with glowing red eyes appears. The background shifts from trees to a smoky room with burning debris on the right. The previous combatants vanish as the new scene takes over completely.

The forest battle scene fully transitions into a dark, smoky interior where a central figure stands clad in black hooded robes. This character wears a metallic mask with glowing red eyes and a chest panel. Behind them, a fire burns brightly on the right side amidst debris, while shadowy statues or structures loom in the background smoke.

The central hooded figure with the red-eyed mask stands still in the fiery room. Behind them, semi-transparent, ghostly images of other combatants fade into view. The view clears to reveal a large hall with columns. A blue-skinned female with head-tails in a dark bodysuit stands left, facing a central figure in a black hooded cloak seen from behind. To the right, a man in armor and a robed figure stand near pillars, while green lightsabers glow in the background left.

Inside the pillared hall, the group remains stationary. The blue-skinned female in black armor faces the central hooded figure. To the right, a man in green armor and a robed figure stand still. In the background, Jedi with green and blue lightsabers maintain their positions amidst the columns.

The scene cross-fades to a close-up combat encounter. A bald, pale figure with facial markings appears on the left, facing an opponent whose armored arm is visible in the foreground. The cross-fade completes, revealing a close-up duel. A bald, pale figure with facial scarring and dark armor featuring red mechanical arm components faces right. He locks weapons with a male figure in brown robes, partially visible in profile on the right. The shot holds steady on the lightsaber clash. The bald figure's red-glowing eyes and mechanical arm remain prominent as he pushes against the robed male. summary.text: [0-6] In a misty forest, a female warrior in yellow-green armor lunges with a blue double-bladed lightsaber against a pale, bald figure in dark armor projecting blue force lightning and holding a red lightsaber, while background soldiers fight. [6-8] The scene cross-fades to a dark, fiery interior as a central figure in a black hood and metallic mask with glowing red eyes appears, replacing the forest combatants. [8-12] The masked figure stands amidst smoke and burning debris while ghostly, semi-transparent images of combatants fade in behind, including silhouettes wielding green and blue lightsabers on the left and right.

[12-16] Inside a large hall with columns, a blue-skinned female with head-tails in a dark bodysuit stands left, facing a central figure in a black hooded cloak seen from behind. To the right, a man in green armor and a robed figure stand near pillars, while green lightsabers glow in the background left. [16-22] The scene cross-fades to a close-up combat encounter where a bald, pale figure with facial scarring and dark armor featuring red mechanical arm components faces right. He locks weapons with a male figure in brown robes, partially visible in profile. A vertical red lightsaber blade and an angled green blade intersect near bulky gauntlets in a dark, stone interior. [22-26] The view clears to a grand hall lined with tall columns and statues. The figure in the black cloak and the blue-skinned female walk away from the camera down the central path, moving steadily toward the background structures as light streams from the left, casting long shadows.

[26-30] A cloaked figure and blue-skinned female walk away while a cross-fade superimposes a large armored entity wearing dark armor, a metallic chest plate with circular details and glowing orange lights, and a mask with red accents. Faint red lightsaber blades appear in the background as the walking figures fade completely. [30-34] The central armored figure remains stationary, facing forward with glowing orange chest lights and red mask accents. The background is dark and smoky with a red hue, featuring vertical red lightsaber blades glowing steadily behind the entity. [34-38] The scene cross-fades to reveal a large circular metallic structure resembling a vault door. A semi-transparent, oversized close-up of a masked face with glowing orange eyes overlays the left side. The central figure stands before the mechanical structure as lighting shifts to a dark grey tone, revealing a vertical stone structure with a small cyan light on the right edge.

[38-44] A bald, pale figure in dark armor extends a mechanical arm weapon while a blue-skinned female crouches nearby; background combatants clash with red and blue lightsabers in a columned hall as a semi-transparent mechanical overlay fades in. [76-80] The view cross-fades into a misty forest duel where the bald armored figure thrusts a red lightsaber, clashing with a female figure in tan clothing wielding a staff weapon emitting a blue blade. The "STAR WARS" text disappears.

[80-82] In a misty forest, a bald figure clad in dark armor thrusts a red lightsaber against a female figure in tan clothing, who defends using a staff weapon emitting a blue blade from its base, their weapons locked in static combat. [86-88] A semi-transparent overlay of a face with intense eyes and a mask dominates the foreground over the lightning scene. [96-100] This static vertical artwork persists without motion or visual alterations. [100-104] The scene transitions to a new static illustration featuring a full-body view of a figure in heavy black armor with red glowing accents on the mask and gauntlets, standing motionless against a dark, smoky grey background while holding a red lightsaber hilt downwards in their right hand, framed by black bars.

[104-110] A static illustration depicts a bald, pale figure in dark armor pointing forward with a mechanical left arm while gripping a red lightsaber. Behind him, a chaotic battlefield scene features smoke, fire, soldiers, and a large mechanical walker remaining motionless within the frame. [110-116] The artwork dissolves into a close-up of the bald figure's face with glowing orange eyes, framed by two bright red lightsaber blades crossing in a large X-shape against a dark, reddish background. [116-118] The portrait cross-fades into a forest combat scene where a transparent image overlays the center. A dark-haired figure in grey armor blocks a strike from the bald figure in heavy black armor, their blue and red lightsabers colliding centrally to generate a bright white flare amidst the trees.

Throughout the sequence from 118 to 130 seconds, the visual remains static, depicting a tense lightsaber duel situated in a forest environment. A bald, pale character wearing black armor locks a red lightsaber against the blue weapon of a dark-haired opponent dressed in a sleeveless grey outfit. The point of contact between the blades emits a bright white flare, illuminating the space between them. The armored figure maintains a strained, grimacing expression, indicating the intensity of the clash. No significant movement occurs between the frames, as the two combatants hold their stance amidst the trees. The scene focuses on this deadlock, with the bright central flare persisting as the red and blue blades remain crossed. The forest setting provides a natural backdrop to the confrontation, with trees visible behind the fighters. The bald character presses his blade forward while the opponent resists.
